summary: Iteration 11 Testing Complete - Weekly Tournaments and Top Contributor features fully functional. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components tested and working.
critical_code_review_comments: All tournament endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Auto-finalization of tournaments correctly awards points (500/250/100 for 1st/2nd/3rd)
Champion badge and tier upgrade logic implemented for 1st place winners
Top Contributor calculation aggregates points from games, check-ins, posts, and likes
Weekly leaderboard cached for 1 hour to reduce DB load
Admin-only tournament creation properly enforced with 403 for non-admins
Sidebar shows Tournaments link with NEW badge
Top Contributor banner displays on both Feed and Tournaments pages
seed_data_creation: 3 initial tournaments seeded automatically when none exist. Admin created 1 test tournament via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tournament feature fully tested: 1) GET /api/tournaments/active returns seeded tournaments with user_entered status. 2) POST /api/tournaments/enter creates entry (title required for non-quiz). 3) GET /api/tournaments/{id}/entries returns entries sorted by votes with user_voted status. 4) POST /api/tournaments/{id}/vote/{entry_id} toggles vote (self-voting blocked). 5) GET /api/tournaments/top-contributor returns weekly leaderboard. 6) GET /api/tournaments/past returns completed tournaments. 7) GET /api/tournaments/hall-of-fame returns champions. 8) POST /api/tournaments/admin/create (admin only). Frontend: Tournaments page with 3 tabs (Active, Weekly Top 10, Hall of Fame), Entry form, Vote buttons, Top Contributor banner on Feed and Tournaments pages, Sidebar link with NEW badge.

active_tournaments.notes: Returns 4 tournaments (3 seeded + 1 admin-created), includes user_entered and user_entry fields

enter_tournament.notes: Creates entry with title, description, media_url, pet_id. Blocks duplicate entries.

tournament_entries.notes: Returns entries sorted by votes_count descending, includes user_voted field

vote_entry.notes: Toggles vote, blocks self-voting with 400 error

top_contributor.notes: Returns top_contributor and top_10 list with weekly scores

past_tournaments.notes: Returns completed tournaments (empty since none completed yet)

hall_of_fame.notes: Returns champions (empty since no tournaments completed yet)

admin_create.notes: Admin can create tournaments, non-admin gets 403

frontend_tournaments_page.notes: 3 tabs (Active, Weekly Top 10, Hall of Fame), tournament cards with Enter Now/Entered badges, View Entries expansion

frontend_entry_form.notes: Title input, description textarea, media URL input, pet select dropdown, submit button

frontend_vote_buttons.notes: Vote buttons on entries with vote count, toggle styling

frontend_top_contributor_banner.notes: Displayed on both Feed and Tournaments pages showing top contributor with points

frontend_sidebar_link.notes: Tournaments link in sidebar under 'Market & Play' with NEW badge
